title: Arcana Species
description: A custom ResourcePack with all my other ResourcePacks and more!
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ybUBuu9.png 'Banner')

## Welcome to Arcana Species!

This Resource Pack is a mix of all my other ones in one single click, and you will find more content such as: random Vanilla blocks tweaked, some changes in names, and even a new language: *Arcana*. Below you can find a list of mods that this resource pack tweaks and the project url for a separate download if you wish. I have some core ideas for this addition: mantain a fairly consistent style. I am not a pixel artist, so expect some color tweaking, animations and maybe some model/texture changes, but nothing crazy. I also use a set of already made resource packs to complement mine that I will link below so you can have almost the same feelings I have.

### Gallery.

In the gallery section you will find tons of images. Take a close look at the title/description of every picture, since it will tell you what is being modified. I do this aclaration because, as I said early, some textures are not mine and you will need to download the corresponding ResourcePack below.

### What does this Resource Pack Include?

As of today, this modpack includes the following:

 <details>
<summary>Minecraft Vanilla</summary>

- A custom rainbow outline with my 3 main colors.
- Elytra retexture.
- Custom languaje and Splashes: Arcana.
- Cyan slimes.
- Golden touches (Spawner block eyes, Yellow Concrete (and powder), Yellow Shulker...)
- LGBTIQA+ Charged Creeper.
- Custom Enchantment Glow.
- Colorful particles.
- [Stargate Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stargate-crosshair).
- [Golden Waystones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-waystones).
- [Quark-less Glint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/quark-less-glint).

 </details>

## Dark Golden Details
Dark Golden Details is the name of the style I've created for this resource pack. Features dark GUI with some gold details to enhance the experience. Also I'm trying to make it compatible with as many computers as possible, drop your recomendations in my [GitHub](https://github.com/Danymaddox/Arcana-Species/issues)

## Recomendations.

I usually play Minecraft using more assets that complements the ones I create. I do recomend using this collection to get the full experience and put Arcana Species at the top of the list.

Note: make sure this is the order you put your ResourcePacks in game. Sadly, due to how Minecraft render some assets (pre 1.20), some of this resource packs will have features removed, specially the icons.png and GUI related textures.

- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
  - Smoother Font.
  - Visual Sapling Growth.
  - Cloud Fog Fix. 
- [Brush-Up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-up)


## Installation.

Use Modrinth App for a one click installation or follow the steps:

- Download the fille.
- Drop it inside your resourcepacks folder.
- Enable Arcane Species inside your game.
- Enjoy!

## It's me, hi!

All my social media can be found here: [Danymaddox](https://linktr.ee/Danymaddox).

And if you like to add more gold, follow me here on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/Danymaddox) and take a look, there's more comming soon.
